children.title: U.S. Overtakes Brazil in Corn Exports to China Ahead of End-Q1 2026
section_path: U.S. Overtakes Brazil in Corn Exports to China Ahead of End-Q1 2026
children.section_path_text: U.S. Overtakes Brazil in Corn Exports to China Ahead of End-Q1 2026
children.summary: Chinese corn imports declined to approximately 3.8M mt in 2025, down from 8.4M mt in 2024. Of this, around 2.5M mt originated from Brazil (Panamax: ~2.0M mt vs.

children.title: Freight Market Overview
children.summary: The Baltic Dry Index (BDI) recorded an uptick in sentiment before the end of the week, with the index value moving above the 2,000-point mark, driven by weekly gains in the Capesize and Panamax segments. The rate for the Tubarao to Qingdao route held the firmer sentiment of the previous week, with rates still around $30/mt (+23% YoY).
